_about: ReScience Python replication repositories (code_url from the ReScience journal bibliography, language=Python). Run with `python benchmark/run_benchmark.py --manifest benchmark/rescience_manifest.json --clone` on a machine with memory + build tools. Heavy scientific installs need real RAM; this is NOT runnable in a 0-GiB-free sandbox.
